examples: Try to incorporate millet into your diet.
The maize and millet were just putting forth ears.
Pearl millet is a cereal grown for foodgrain and straw in the hottest, driest areas of Africa and Asia.
Drinkers pour hot water over the grains and drink it through a straw, which blocks the millet.
Known locally as mbege, the concoction of millet and bananas is the traditional brew of the Chagga people.
